posts.author: kapoorritesh (Ritesh Kapoor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I am trying to create combine time line for DEV and QA on the board so I can display 1 time line on the enterprise board for reporting and Gantt chart. If there any way of combining the 2 time line columns to display one timeline?
